label: Label
recurring_desc: All recurring activities with a scheduled next date. “✓ done” rolls the date forward by its frequency.
mytasks_desc: Tasks assigned to you across all checklists.
no_owner: You haven’t been assigned tasks yet — open a checklist and use “assign owner”.
gantt_legend: green = projected one-time completion · orange ticks = recurring due dates
offboarding_desc: Start a run when someone leaves — it copies the runbook into a dated file you tick off and commit.
reminder_label: ⏱ Revoke critical access within hours; git records who did each step.
poam_desc: Track findings, remediation owners, due dates and status (Plan of Action & Milestones).
mapping_desc: One control area, satisfied across frameworks — do it once, evidence it everywhere.
trend_desc: Checkbox completion over time, reconstructed from git history.
checks_desc: Lightweight, evidence-backed checks. Cloud integrations are stubs until configured.
reports_desc: Snapshot the status with a git-hash integrity anchor — share with auditors or as a trust page.
remote_desc: Add a PRIVATE git repo (GitHub/GitLab/self-hosted) so history is backed up. Never use a public repo — these records are sensitive.
remote_hint: Create an empty PRIVATE repo on your host, paste its SSH/HTTPS URL, then Push.
activity_ph: …a recurring activity’s name to see its full history
applicability: Applicability — which frameworks apply to you
reminders_hint: Run scripts/notify.js from cron to post overdue items to this webhook.
ai_desc: Explain a control, draft a policy, or find your gaps. Not legal advice.
ai_not_configured: AI is not configured. Set AI_API_KEY (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint — including your own gateway) and restart.
pick_frameworks: Pick frameworks in Settings or below.
add_database_desc: Clones the Israel PPL per-database checklist. Company-wide tasks sync across all databases; per-level tasks across same-level databases.
welcome: Welcome — let’s set up your compliance
welcome_desc: Pick the frameworks that apply to you. You can change these any time, add more later, and (for Israel) manage a checklist per personal-data database.
onboard_hint: Only what you enable will be prominent. OWASP applies to everyone who writes software.
